dungeon: ROTF PROGRESSION GUIDE video (not a dungeon run) — documents META-SYSTEMS: white-star fame, the Legion system, potion storage / 8-8 stat maxing, essences->galaxy pets. GENUINE ROTF.
source: video disc_wVNmBYMGN0A (189 f_, 47 chat, 1 dungeon entry). Mostly large on-screen TEXT tutorial panels (a 'how to get your first white star' / newbie-progression guide) over orange/brown brick mansion-interior gameplay. Boss data is thin; the value is verbatim ROTF system descriptions + a realm-event feed.

bosses.name: (realm event-feed bosses only — guide video, no isolated boss fight)
bosses.note: Chat global feed shows realm events: 'shadowscale has just spawned', plus Hydra / Riverborn / Realm Giant defeat/spawn lines — consistent with the /30 realm-event system. No on-screen boss fight captured.

drops: fame-bonus items (4-6%, buyable ~500 fame on the market)
mechanics: DOCUMENTED ROTF META-SYSTEMS (verbatim from the guide's text panels): (1) LEGION SYSTEM — a guild-equivalent that is 'an important part of the game', gives 'good performance gains, as well as loot drops', and boosts fame by +33%; you accumulate LEGION POINTS and a RANK (viewable, '...number of legion points and rank (via L[menu])'), and 'Bonuses from previous ranks are not disregarded' (ranks STACK). (2) WHITE-STAR / FAME — to get a white star get level 20 + farm fame in the realm (Oryx Guards give a lot of fame); compute final fame as base x1.33 (guild boost) + initial; '>2000 fame -> you can safely die and get 5 stars per character'. (3) POTION STORAGE + 8/8 STAT MAXING — 'After getting level 20, we go to the potion storage and use potions until we are 8/8' (8 stats); pairs with the stat-pot cap lines ('Potion of X consumed. N left to max.' from disc_wsRSijbExRI). (4) FAST LEVELING — 'buy or find 3 quest chests; use the experience booster, and beat the chests' to hit level 20; 'do not recommend dungeons, only inside the realm'. (5) ESSENCES -> GALAXY PETS — 'the easiest way to get pets is to use essences in the galaxy 1. You just use essences and get potions' (ties to the D3 Galactic Zones; essences are a galaxy currency that yields pets + potions).
uncertain: Legion-menu hotkey read as 'L' (panel text partly truncated). The mansion-interior dungeon name not legible (minimap label 'Mansion ...?'). Fame math paraphrased from a fast-scrolling text panel. Whether 'Legion' is literally the guild system or a separate progression track is unclear (guide treats it as guild-like).
confidence: HIGH that this is GENUINE ROTF and documents the Legion / white-star / potion-storage / essences-pets systems verbatim from guide text. MEDIUM on exact numbers (fame thresholds, +33%) and the legion hotkey. No boss-fight/taunt recovery this tag.
